scene_descriptions.page_description: A dark screen displaying text instructions for a user research task about planning a holiday to London from the Sunshine Coast.
The Google homepage with a search bar in the center and various links at the top and bottom.
A dark screen with a reminder to think aloud and an 'Open' button in the center.
A dark screen with a reminder to think aloud, an 'Open' button, and a 'Repeat the task instructions' button.
A dark screen asking 'What are you thinking right now?' with an 'Open' button and a 'Repeat the task instructions' button.
The Google homepage with a search bar in the center.
A dark screen displaying task instructions with an 'Open' button and a 'Repeat the task instructions' button.
A dark blue screen with a white circular loading animation in the center.
A dark screen displaying task instructions with an 'Open' button and a 'Repeat the task instructions' button.
A dark screen asking 'What are you looking at right now?' with an 'Open' button and a 'Repeat the task instructions' button.
The Skyscanner homepage showing a flight search form with fields for origin, destination, dates, and travellers.
The Skyscanner homepage with the flight search form.
The Skyscanner homepage with 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' entered in the 'From' field.
The Skyscanner homepage with 'lo' typed in the 'To' field, displaying a dropdown of London airport options.
A loading state for Skyscanner flight search results with skeleton loaders and 'Searching' text.
The Skyscanner homepage with 'london' typed in the 'To' field and a dropdown of airport options.
Skyscanner flight search results page showing various flight options from Sunshine Coast to London with filters on the left.

The 'Japan' Trello board with cards and images.
A Google Chrome new tab page with a search bar and several website shortcuts.
The Booking.com homepage with a 'Sign in, save money' modal overlay.

The Booking.com homepage with the search form.
The Booking.com homepage with 'London, Greater London, United Kingdom' entered in the destination field.
